title: Ensure Redundancy is set to 'geo-redundant storage (GRS)' on critical Azure Storage

remediation_metadata.impact_statement: Storage without geo-redundant replication places critical business data at risk of total region outages.
remediation_metadata.validation_steps: Verify redundancy is set to GRS in Azure Portal under Storage redundancy configurations or run az storage account show.

templates.azure_cli: az storage account update --name {{ resource.name }} --sku Standard_GRS
